LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANTS GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC AND ETS SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY), THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT ADDRESS THE MERITS OF ITS DEMURRER ON THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING), THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED ALL REQUISITE ELEMENTS EXCEPT THAT PLAINTIFF DID ALL OR SUBSTANTIALLY ALL THE THINGS THAT WERE REQUIRED OF HER UNDER THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT. AS TO THE 3RD, 6TH, AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION (FRAUD AND DECEIT), THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF ALLEGE WITH PARTICULARITY FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE HOW SHE COULD NOT HAVE DISCOVERED THE TRUE NATURE OF THE FRAUD OR MISREPRESENTATIONS THROUGH REASONABLE DILIGENCE (WHY THE "LATER DISCOVERY" RULE SHOULD APPLY.) MOREOVER, THE CLAIMS ARE NOT STATED WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY AS TO WHO MADE AN ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATION, THEIR AUTHORITY TO SPEAK ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT(S), WHAT THE MISREPRESENTATION CONSISTED OF, AND WHEN IT OCCURRED. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (UCL CLAIM), THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY WHICH SECTION OF THE UCL THE DEFENDANT(S) VIOLATED AND THE ACTS THAT CONSTITUTE THE VIOLATION. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL), THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CLAIM IS CONTINGENT UPON THE 3RD, 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION BEING SUCCESSFULLY PLED. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS AS TO WHY THE RELIANCE WAS JUSTIFIABLE.AS TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION (RESTITUTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT), THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE IS NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT; IT IS A FORM OF RESTITUTION. AS TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION (QUIET TITLE), SEE FURTHER DETAILS IN MINUTES.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC AND ETS SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - As to the 1st cause of action (Breach of Fiduciary Duty), the Demurrer is overruled. Defendant does not address the merits of its demurrer on this cause of action.
As to the 2nd cause of action (Breach of Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing), the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled all requisite elements except that plaintiff did all or substantially all the things that were required of her under the terms of the contract.
As to the 3rd, 6th, and 7th causes of action (Fraud and Deceit), the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff allege with particularity facts that demonstrate how she could not have discovered the true nature of the fraud or misrepresentations through reasonable diligence (why the "later discovery" rule should apply.)
Moreover, the claims are not stated with sufficient particularity as to who made an alleged misrepresentation, their authority to speak on behalf of the defendant(s), what the misrepresentation consisted of, and when it occurred.
As to the 4th cause of action (UCL Claim), the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead with sufficient particularity which section of the UCL the defendant(s) violated and the acts that constitute the violation.
As to the 5th cause of action (Promissory Estoppel), the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. This claim is contingent upon the 3rd, 6th and 7th causes of action being successfully pled. Plaintiff must allege facts as to why the reliance was justifiable.
As to the 8th cause of action (Restitution for Unjust Enrichment), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. There is no cause of action for Unjust Enrichment; it is a form of restitution.
As to the 9th cause of action (Quiet Title), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. This claim is barred by res judicata based upon the ruling and judgment in the Unlawful Detainer action.
As to the 10th cause of action (Cal. Rosenthal Act), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Foreclosure proceedings do not constitute a debt collection activity under the Act. Morgera v. Countrywide Home Loans, Inc., (2010) WL 160348 at *3.
As to the 11th cause of action (Civil Conspiracy), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Civil Conspiracy is not a valid cause of action; rather it is merely a theory of liability.
As to the 12th cause of action (Declaratory Relief), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. This cause of action is also barred under res judicata because of the issues already determined in the Unlawful Detainer action. The validity of defendant's title was necessarily determined again plaintiff.
As to the 13th cause of action (Rescission/Cancellation of Instrument), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Again this claim is barred by the prior UD action, which necessarily determined that the deed of trust and loan agreement were valid.
As to the 14th cause of action (Accounting), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. An accounting claim is to determine how much the defendant owes the plaintiff. Teselle v. McLouglin, (2009) 173 Cal.App.4th 156.
As to the 15th and 16th causes of action (Injunctive Relief and Violations of 2934(d) and (e), the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. These claims are also barred by res judicata. (Moving party to prepare proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
